[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 101110111 7
2 100110010 4
3 110101000 4
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 001011000 3
